prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第81名，较2021年93名、2022年95名、2023年97名、2024年96名、2025年82名持续上升，近年排名明显提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及空调费争议等一般性管理话题，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第49位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；2022年曾有一次师德师风负面事件，但距今已较远，影响已淡化；外国语言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心优势；理科组招生专业中的数据科学与大数据技术、精算学等虽不直接对应外国语言文学，但依托学校语言+数据交叉培养特色形成差异化竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数据科学与大数据技术属计算机/大数据方向，社会热度评估为"推荐"（2024年计算机类），热度较高；精算学属金融/统计交叉方向，热度偏热；新闻传播学类2023年评估为"明显劝退"，热度偏低。陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；省控线数据2026年缺失，；上海外国语大学位于上海市，属一线城市热门地域，对陕西考生有较强吸引力；该校在陕西理科组招生规模较小（4–8人），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素对报考热度有正向作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划翻倍扩招（4→8人）、本省物理类考生增加约19.7%、学校排名持续上升及声誉中性偏稳等因素，扩招100%对位次的缓解作用显著，但考生增加近20%部分抵消了扩招红利，同时学校排名上升和上海地域吸引力对报考热度有正向拉动。预计2026年最低位次约15722名，较2025年9951名大幅后移约5771名，区间15222–16222名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 5109 → 9424 → 9832 → 13772 → 9951, showing a significant overall downward trend; after a sharp drop to 13772 in 2024, it rebounded to 9951 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 3800 in the past two years, and the 2025 baseline is about 9951; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 4 in 2025 for the physics category; the 2026 physics category plan is 8, a 100% increase from 2025, doubling the enrollment quota, which significantly alleviates competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks approximately 81st, showing a continuous upward trend from 93rd in 2021, 95th in 2022, 97th in 2023, 96th in 2024, and 82nd in 2025, reflecting the university's enhanced overall strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only general management topics such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 49th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate admission attention; there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics in 2022, but it is now distant and its impact has faded; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the university's core advantage; majors in the science group such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Actuarial Science, although not directly corresponding to Foreign Language and Literature, leverage the university's distinctive language + data cross-training feature to form differentiated competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology falls under the computer/big data direction, with a social popularity assessment of 'recommended' (2024 computer category), and is highly popular; Actuarial Science is in the finance/statistics cross direction, with a relatively hot popularity; the Journalism and Communication category was assessed as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023, with low popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the examinee pool and intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with a popular region, which strongly attracts Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment scale in the Shaanxi science group is small (4–8 people), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors positively influence application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant downward trend in historical rankings, the doubling of the 2026 enrollment plan (4→8), an approximately 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees, the university's rising ranking, and a neutral and stable reputation, the 100% enrollment expansion significantly alleviates ranking pressure, but the nearly 20% increase in examinees partially offsets the expansion dividend, while the university's rising ranking and Shanghai's regional appeal positively drive application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 15,722, a significant drop of about 5,771 from the 2025 ranking of 9,951, with a range of 15,222–16,222.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Actuarial Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding International Journalism and Communication Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15,222–16,222, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Rankings better than the upper limit of the range (<15,222) can focus on aiming for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology; rankings close to the lower limit of the range (>16,222) are advised to primarily target Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 491 → 810 → 669 → 2067 → 1441, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; after a sharp drop to 2067 in 2024, it rebounded to 1441 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 600 places in the past two years, and a baseline of about 1441 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 4 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 9 in 2025 for the history category; the 2026 history category plan is 11, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025, with enrollment quotas continuously increasing, which somewhat alleviates competition for applications.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 81st in 2026, rising from 93rd in 2021, 95th in 2022, 97th in 2023, 96th in 2024, and 82nd in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in recent years, reflecting enhanced overall strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, only involving general management topics such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention; there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics in 2022, but it is now distant and its impact has faded; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the core advantage of the university; majors in the enrollment plan such as Translation and French directly correspond to the first-level discipline of Foreign Language and Literature, with outstanding disciplinary strength; the Journalism and Communication category, though not separately rated, leverages language advantages to form unique features.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is assessed as 'generally wait-and-see' (2024), overall stable; the Journalism and Communication category was assessed as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023, with low popularity; Law is assessed as 'divided wait-and-see', with high attention but divided opinions. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with a popular region, strongly attractive to Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is not high (about 4–11 people in the liberal arts group), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors have a positive effect on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 22%, the increase in provincial history category examinees by about 17%, the continuous rise in university rankings, and a neutral and stable reputation, the mitigating effect of expansion on rankings and the intensifying effect of increased examinees on competition roughly offset each other, but the rise in university rankings and the attractiveness of Shanghai as a region positively drive application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 1613, a slight backward shift of about 172 places from 1441 in 2025, with a range of 1323–1903.
